docs.description: Use for architecture, roadmap, and design decisions

xcode-scheme.description: Xcode test scheme configuration with -parallel-testing-enabled NO

test.description: Run the full macOS test suite (34 tests)
test.template:
Run the macOS Xcode test suite:

```bash
xcodebuild test \
  -project apps/macos-screening-llm-assistant/macos-screening-llm-assistant.xcodeproj \
  -scheme "macos-screening-llm-assistant" \
  -destination "platform=macOS" \
  -configuration Debug \
  -parallel-testing-enabled NO
```

build.template:
Build the macOS app:

```bash
xcodebuild build \
  -project apps/macos-screening-llm-assistant/macos-screening-llm-assistant.xcodeproj \
  -scheme "macos-screening-llm-assistant" \
  -destination "platform=macOS" \
  -configuration Debug
```

otel.description: Start local observability stack (OTel + Grafana + Prometheus)
otel.template:
Start the local OpenTelemetry dev stack:

```bash
docker compose -f development/docker-compose.yml up -d
# Grafana: http://localhost:3000 (admin/admin)
# OTel Collector: localhost:4318
```
